connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: X1 - Crystal
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 32kHz watch crystal

connectors.name: X2 - Crystal
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 32kHz watch crystal

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: CE - Chip Enable
connectors.description: This pin is used as a chip enable and to initiate communications with the device. This pin is active high and the chip will be enabled when this pin has a logic high presented to it. Connect this pin to a digital output pin of your controller

connectors.name: I/O - SPI Data In/Out
connectors.description: This pin is used to read data from the device and to write data to the device

connectors.name: SCLK - SPI Clock
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the 'SPI Clock' (SCLK) signal of the controller

connectors.name: Vbat - Backup Supply
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the positive connection of a 3V battery
